chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-937 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 10.09.2025 Syed Ameer Ali Shah, Advocate along with petitioner Mr. Mumtaz Ali Jehangir Lashari, Advocate for respondents No.7&8. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General ************** Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the present Constitution Petition if directions are issued to the Assistant Commissioner, Nara, District Khairpur, to decide the Revenue Appeal pending before him. Learned counsel for private respondents and the learned AAG raised no objection. Under these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondent No.3, Assistant Commissioner, Nara, District Khairpur, to decide the Revenue Appeal (if pending) before him within 30 days from the date of receipt of a copy of this order, on merits and in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
